title: Fabric Seasons: Croptopia Compat
body:
## Fabric Seasons: Croptopia Compat A simple mod that adds compatibility between Croptopia and Fabric Seasons.
### Description This mod adds crop compatibility for Croptopia crops, allowing them to have different growing speeds according to the current season. ### Seasonal Crops
### Other Information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/fabric-seasons-croptopia-compat](https://github.com/lucaargolo/fabric-seasons-croptopia-compat) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
